scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,mobile -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run server:dev" "npm run mobile:start"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,mobile,ngrok -c "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run server:dev" "npm run mobile:start" "npm run dev:ngrok"
scripts.server:dev:clean: npm run kill:8787 && npm run server:dev
